narrative:
Circleville 3-A (precinct in Pickaway County) has 1,172 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.3 percentage points.
